resources.string: Assign one to this display in the web app.
This playlist has nothing to show yet.
Add slides in the web app — this screen updates on its own.
This app needs configuration before it can run.
Add supabase.url and supabase.anon.key to local.properties, sync Gradle, rebuild, and enable anonymous sign-in in Supabase.
Can\'t reach the service right now.
Check the network. If this keeps happening, contact support with the time this appeared.

This TV does not trust the security certificate for your Supabase server (often on Android emulator images without updated CA certificates, wrong date and time, or a captive Wi‑Fi portal). Try a system update, correct date and time, another network, or a physical Android TV / Play‑certified device.
Close and reopen this app, then enter a new pairing code from the web app.
